rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS GREGORY HILL JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Regarding Disputed Fund Held In Escrow
rulings.Rulings: Administrator Jeri Hill's Motion Regarding Disputed Funds in Escrow is DENIED without prejudice. The Court cannot order an offset of the disputed funds because a setoff claim may only be used defensively, being in nature a defensive pleaidng asserting that the claim constituted prior payment for the amount sought in the plaintiff's complaint. (Construction Protective Services, Inc. v. TIG Specialty Co. (2002) 29 Cal.4th 189, 197.) At present, no amounts have been awarded to the Bookers, thus any setoff is premature.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Renotice Of Notice Of Motion, Motion To Reschedule Hearing And Motion To Vacate Order Appointing Evered Cohen, Personal Representative Of Said Estate
rulings.Rulings: Mary Cohen's Motion to Vacate the Appointment of Evered Cohen as Administrator is DENIED. Pursuant to Probate Code Section 8463, the Court had authority to appoint Evered Cohen. The prevailing party must prepare an order. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative ruling must notify the Court (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on March 12, 2014.
